ideas.name: send-parameterized-sql-over-socket
ideas.author: Vehir
ideas.description: A lightweight C client library that sends parameterized SQL statements over a Unix socket to the db-proxy daemon, with strict error handling and zero silent failure on connection loss.

edges.author: Vehir
edges.description: Routes SQL queries from the db client library over a Unix socket to the db-proxy daemon for validation and execution
